---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# Aaron Robbins

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Business Intelligence & Analytics Leader
:::

::: {.hero-tagline}
12+ years building BI and analytics platforms across healthcare, e-commerce, and manufacturing.
SQL · Microsoft Fabric · Power BI · Python · Azure
:::

::: {.hero-ctas}
<!-- TODO (Cowork): add resume PDF link when ready -->
[View Work](#cascadia-portfolio){.btn .btn-primary}
[Resume](#){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/aaronrobbins){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[GitHub](https://github.com/RobbinsAnalytics){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

---

<!-- TODO (Cowork): Replace placeholder bio paragraphs below with final approved copy. -->

::: {.todo-block}
**TODO (Cowork — index hero copy):** Replace the one-liner positioning above and this section with the final "Aaron Robbins" hero narrative (2–4 sentences positioning statement, highlighting 12+ yrs experience, CVS/healthcare angle, and Cascadia portfolio concept).
:::

## The Cascadia Portfolio {#cascadia-portfolio}

<!-- TODO (Cowork): 2–3 sentences on the Cascadia family concept. -->

::: {.todo-block}
**TODO (Cowork — Cascadia intro):** 2–3 sentences explaining the Cascadia family concept — one production-grade analytics architecture (SQL Server → Microsoft Fabric medallion → Power BI) applied across different industry domains to prove it generalizes. Emphasize real public data, repeatable patterns, and interview-ready depth.
:::

---

### Featured Case Studies

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-label}
Manufacturing
:::
### Cascadia Medical Devices
<span class="badge-status">Live</span>

Predictive maintenance and OEE analytics on a 6M-row simulated MES dataset, built on SQL Server star schema → Microsoft Fabric → Power BI.

[View Case Study](projects/cascadia-medical-devices.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/RobbinsAnalytics/manufacturing-analytics){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-label}
Healthcare / Pharmacy
:::
### Cascadia Pharmacy
<span class="badge-status">In Build</span>

GLP-1 drug spend growth and immunization coverage analytics on real CMS Medicare Part D + CDC VaxView public data. Messy-data cleaning showcase.

[View Case Study](projects/cascadia-pharmacy.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/RobbinsAnalytics/cascadia-pharmacy-analytics){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-label}
Retail
:::
### Cascadia Clothing
<span class="badge-status coming-soon">Coming Soon</span>

Customer segmentation and inventory analytics — the third domain in the Cascadia family, planned for Q3 2026.

[Preview](projects/cascadia-clothing.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

:::

---

## Why Cascadia?

<!-- TODO (Cowork): 1–2 short paragraphs on the "why" behind the multi-domain portfolio strategy. -->

::: {.todo-block}
**TODO (Cowork — "Why Cascadia?" section):** 1–2 paragraphs explaining the strategic decision to build one reusable architecture across three industry verticals — showing that the engineering skill transfers, not just domain knowledge. Optional: add a quote or pull-stat (e.g., "6M+ rows processed, 3 domains, 1 architecture").
:::

[Learn about the Cascadia architecture →](cascadia.qmd)
